basic_info.short_form: St Joseph College of Engineering Chennai

address.map_location: St Joseph College of Engineering, Chennai

pos_sentences.text: There will be many placement training which will be helpful for the students
pos_sentences.name: Review Ranger

pos_sentences.text: College Food remains the best and Every items in the canteen cost less prices.
pos_sentences.name: Review Ranger

pos_sentences.text: There the canteen you can get any kind of juice for 5rs and snaks items like puff are just 5rs you can’t able to believe what i am telling you can search on internet for it .
pos_sentences.name: Tamilselvan p

pos_sentences.text: The staff and the management were kind and very welcoming with their attitude
pos_sentences.name: Nithin

pos_sentences.text: There are plenty of learning opportunities and places available for the students of this campus and also others who seek to improve
pos_sentences.name: Nithin

pos_sentences.text: The campus of st Joseph’s is a fully spacious and spanning dozens of acres of land with various establishments made along
pos_sentences.name: Nithin

pos_sentences.text: infrastructure is very beautiful and freshly cutout grasses all along the fences and right up the rally
pos_sentences.name: saravana priyan

pos_sentences.text: the ambience and its environment is very nice
pos_sentences.name: saravana priyan

pos_sentences.text: college campus is looking good with full of trees
pos_sentences.name: Rooban Raj A

pos_sentences.text: placement is very good because many companies coming for recruitment
pos_sentences.name: Rooban Raj A

neg_sentences.text: the exam schedule provided by the college is very hectic
neg_sentences.name: S HARIPRASATH

neg_sentences.text: Rules are very absurd, ties,tucked in,formals(dress code maintanence is must)
neg_sentences.name: S HARIPRASATH

neg_sentences.text: Not everyone gets opportunity for extra curriculars, and we have to get OD from staff
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: Facilities in college are not accessible by all
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: Exposure is not that much as students have to stay inside the college even when there is no class
neg_sentences.name: Review Ranger

neg_sentences.text: College timings are not suitable for many
neg_sentences.name: Review Ranger

neg_sentences.text: Teaching is not that much useful as students have to study by self during the exams
neg_sentences.name: Review Ranger

neg_sentences.text: The water and food hygiene were a bit low
neg_sentences.name: Nithin

neg_sentences.text: College faculty need to change their teaching method
neg_sentences.name: Rooban Raj A

neg_sentences.text: College and hostel rules need to be changed
neg_sentences.name: Rooban Raj A
